---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Mapillary Explorer
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short one or two-sentence description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem or Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? What workflow would it improve?
Describe the situation where you found yourself wishing this existed.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you imagine this feature working. Be as specific or as high-level as you like; rough ideas are welcome.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you tried working around this limitation in another way? 
Is there an existing feature that partially covers this need?

## Context

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Related feature area | e.g. Turbo Mode / Coverage Analysis / InfoBox / Settings / Minimap |
| Would require backend? | Yes / No / Not sure |
| Affects settings panel? | Yes / No |

## Mockup or Example
If you have a sketch, screenshot annotation, or reference to a similar feature in another tool, add it here. Not required but very helpful.

## Additional Context
Any other context, links, or references that support this request. For example: a Mapillary forum thread, an OSM community discussion, or a specific deployment scenario where this would be valuable.
